arts.ttl: Serie A | Como v Udinese: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Como's squad is shaping up nicely for their upcoming match with Udinese, with key player Nico Paz back in contention after recovering from an ankle setback. The creative midfielder is likely to be available for selection, potentially starting on the bench. The post Serie A | Como v Udinese: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Como vs Udinese to round out MD21
arts.sum: Como and Udinese are two of the three teams, along with Genoa, that haven’t scored a penalty in Serie A this season; on the other hand, only Venezia (six) have conceded more penalty goals than the Lariani and Friulians (both five, alongside Cagliari and Genoa). Lorenzo Lucca has scored seven goals in 19 matches in the current league season, and is just one away from equalling his total from the previous Serie A campaign.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fabregas speaks out on Ansu Fati to Como transfer links
arts.sum: Ansu Fati's Barcelona future is looking bleaker and bleaker as the weeks and months go by.

arts.sum: As the Serie A season reaches its midpoint, ambitious Como welcome mid-table Udinese to the Stadio Sinigaglia on Monday evening in a match that could have significant implications for both sides' campaigns. arts.ttl: ‘I saw the ball there and just decided to go for it’ - James Abankwah on getting booked seconds into his Watford debut
arts.sum: Abankwah (21) completed his loan move from Udinese, Watford’s sister club, only last week, following Ebosele who made a similar switch earlier this season but was pitched straight into the first team by Cleverley for Watford’s game away to Derby County, and a clean sheet was a platform for the side to go on and take home a 2-0 win. Abankwah’s Ireland U-21 teammate Sam Curtis also enjoyed a successful debut, for St Johnstone, with a win and a clean sheet in their Scottish FA Cup tie at home to Motherwell.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fàbregas: “Real Madrid can buy Nico Paz back, but at a certain price”
arts.sum: While Real Madrid retains a buy-back clause, Fàbregas made it clear in a recent press conference that Paz is at the heart of Como’s long-term vision. Como 1907 head coach Cesc Fàbregas has lavished praise on Nico Paz, the Argentine midfielder who has emerged as one of Serie A’s brightest talents this season.
